blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,253 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 64".
